For senior leadership selection comparing candidates against a leadership benchmark, the OPQ Leadership Report provides targeted insights into leadership potential and competency. Complementing this, the OPQ Universal Competency Report 1.0 offers a broader view of an individual's behavioral impact on general competencies. Both reports can be generated from a single administration of the OPQ instrument, offering a robust solution for your executive hiring needs.
